name: CROSS_TARGETPAIR_DIVERSITY_BY_ORIGIN_RANGE
description: Distinct target pair diversity by origin in a year range.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name:$origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair), (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= $start_year AND y.year <= $end_year
RETURN o.name AS origin, count(DISTINCT tp) AS distinct_targetpairs, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
LIMIT 1;

examples: China 在2023-2025有多少distinct target pairs?
